title: dactylorhiza × kuehnensis subsp. kuuskiae
intro: Dactylorhiza × kuehnensis subsp. kuuskiae is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and is native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × kuehnensis subsp. kuuskiae include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
